concerns.text: FR-015 (validate_sampling_distribution) and FR-018 (detection algorithm/thresholds) lack dedicated implementation tasks. T014 mentions implementing detection logic but does not explicitly cover the separate module requirement of FR-015 or the specific threshold definition task of FR-018.

FR-009 (execute_fallback module) and FR-013 (validate_proxy_mos module) are missing corresponding task entries. T027 implements fallback logic inline but does not create the distinct module required by FR-009. T031 implements the logic but lacks the specific task for the FR-013 module.
FR-016 (Power Analysis) is missing a corresponding task. The spec requires implementing a power analysis to justify sample sizes, but no task exists to calculate or log these parameters.
FR-021 (Link contracts to data-model/quickstart) is missing a task. No task exists to update documentation to link schema definitions as required.

FR-019 (Fetch canonical source) and FR-022 (Data Unavailable handling) are partially covered by T009, but T009 contradicts the Plan's 'Critical Data Constraint' (which mandates failure if Wan-Streamer logs are missing, whereas T009 suggests fetching VoxCeleb2 as a fallback for latent data). This creates an unresolvable implementation conflict for the data fetcher.

T015 references T039 (reduce_sample_size) which is defined in Phase 5. This creates a circular/forward dependency where a Phase 3 task calls a Phase 5 artifact. T039 should be moved to Phase 2 or 3 to be callable by T015.
